Apr. 23, 2024 
CDC Streamlines Access to Clinical Laboratory Data 
CDC contracts boost clinical lab data for public health practitioners by more than double 
Apr. 23, 2025 
Technical Resources 
These tools and tips help syndromic surveillance practitioners protect our communities. 
Access & Management Center 
The Access & Management Center (AMC) launches NSSP apps. It also supports administrative functions. 
ESSENCE 
ESSENCE is the key tool that allows public health professionals to analyze BioSense Platform data. 
Community of Practice 
The NSSP CoP unites more than 1,400 public health professionals in sharing tools and expertise. 
Helpful Articles 
Our library of articles offers guidance and tips for syndromic surveillance practitioners. 
Building our community 
Syndromic Surveillance for New Users 
This guide will help new users get informed and engaged with the syndromic surveillance community. 
Learn More 
Apr. 23, 2024 
Featured content 
Supporting Healthy Communities 
NSSP provides an early warning system to enable rapid response to emerging health threats. 
Apr. 23, 2024 
NSSP and Health Care Providers 
By integrating the EHR with public health data, CDC can improve response to health threats. 
Apr. 23, 2024 
Inpatient Data Improves MIS-C Tracking 
The Pennsylvania Department of Health used inpatient syndromic data to boost MIS-C case detection. 
Sept. 4, 2024
